dimensions.name: Testability
dimensions.level_1: No Acceptance Criteria or criteria describe code artifacts rather than behavior.
dimensions.level_3: AC exist but some are ambiguous or cannot directly drive test cases.
dimensions.level_5: Each AC describes an observable system behavior; tests can be written directly from AC.

dimensions.name: Ambiguity Free
dimensions.level_3: One or two borderline terms but overall intent is clear.
dimensions.level_5: Zero ambiguous terms. Every term either defined or self-evident from context.

dimensions.name: State Uniformity
dimensions.level_1: Only happy-path described. Error states and edge cases absent.
dimensions.level_3: Some error states covered but loading/empty/adversarial cases missing.
dimensions.level_5: All states (success, error, empty, inapplicable) and adversarial cases explicitly covered.

dimensions.name: Precondition Hygiene
dimensions.level_1: External prerequisite masked as implementation step. No preconditions section.
dimensions.level_3: Prerequisites mentioned but not isolated in a dedicated Preconditions section.
dimensions.level_5: All external prerequisites isolated in Preconditions section with explicit stop conditions.

dimensions.name: Grounding Realism
dimensions.level_1: Spec references non-existent files, gems or patterns not in the project.
dimensions.level_3: Mostly grounded but one or two references need verification.
dimensions.level_5: All file paths, patterns and gems verified to exist in the current codebase.
